1 Catch table

1.1 No replicated records in Catch data

Data included in the catch table were checked for the presence of duplicated records. The result of the check is here reported:

  • No replicated records in Catch data

Attention: eventual duplicated records will be removed from catch data for the following analysis

1.2 Presence of disaggregated records

Data included in the catch table were checked for the presence of disaggregated records. The result of the check is here reported:

  • No disaggregated records in Catch data

1.3 Check missing years in time series

Data where checked for the continuity of the time series, identifying the presence of missing years:

  • The following years are missing in the Catch data time series (NEP - ITA - GSA 18): 2002, 2003, 2004, 2005, 2006, 2007, 2008, 2009, 2010, 2011, 2012, 2013, 2014, 2015, 2016, 2017, 2018

1.5 Check of Sum of Products (SOP)

Records for which the Sum Of Product (SOP) in weight differs in absolute terms more then 5% threshold chosen from the landings or discards volumes declared.

1.5.1.1 NEP

2.6 Kolmogorov-Smirnov test of landings LFDs

The Kolmogorov-Smirnov test provides cumulative length distribution plots by fishery and year. The test is performed on couples of years to assess if their distributions belong to the same population. The table reports only the cases in which the distribution does not belong to the same population in the given comparison.

2.6.1 GSA 18

2.6.1.1 NEP

Plot of cumulative length distributions by fishery and year for NEP - ITA - GSA 18 TableGrob (1 x 2) “arrange”: 2 grobs z cells name grob OTB_DEF 1 (1-1,1-1) arrange gtable[layout] OTB_MDD 2 (1-1,2-2) arrange gtable[layout]

3.8 Kolmogorov-Smirnov test

The Kolmogorov-Smirnov test provides cumulative length distribution plots by fishery and year. The summary table reports only the cases in which the distribution does not belong to the same population in the given comparison.
